ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter state code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the state is located (e.g., Northeast, South) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Full name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state in which the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in feet */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_data" (
  "census_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "population_2000" INTEGER /* Population of the state/city as of 2000 census */,
  "population_2010" INTEGER /* Population of the state/city as of 2010 census */,
  "population_2020" INTEGER /* Population of the state/city as of 2020 census */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_change" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population change entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "change_2000_2010" INTEGER /* Population change between 2000 and 2010 */,
  "change_2010_2020" INTEGER /* Population change between 2010 and 2020 */,
  "growth_rate_2000_2010" REAL /* Population growth rate between 2000 and 2010 */,
  "growth_rate_2010_2020" REAL /* Population growth rate between 2010 and 2020 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_change_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_change_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percent_change" (
  "percent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percent change entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "percent_change_2000_2010" REAL /* Percent change in population between 2000 and 2010 */,
  "percent_change_2010_2020" REAL /* Percent change in population between 2010 and 2020 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percent_change_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percent_change_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "high_school_grad_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate */,
  "bachelors_degrees" REAL /* Percentage of population with bachelor's degrees */,
  "masters_degrees" REAL /* Percentage of population with master's degrees */,
  "phd_degrees" REAL /* Percentage of population with PhD degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "per_capita_income" INTEGER /* Per capita income */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "child_poverty_rate" REAL /* Child poverty rate */,
  "elderly_poverty_rate" REAL /* Elderly poverty rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_insurance" (
  "health_insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health insurance entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "health_insurance_rate" REAL /* Health insurance rate */,
  "uninsured_rate" REAL /* Uninsured rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_insurance_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_insurance_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment" (
  "unemployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unemployment entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "youth_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Youth unemployment rate */,
  "long_term_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Long-term unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unemployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "violent_crime_rate" REAL /* Violent crime rate */,
  "property_crime_rate" REAL /* Property crime rate */,
  "murder_rate" REAL /* Murder rate */,
  "burglary_rate" REAL /* Burglary rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "homeownership_rate" REAL /* Homeownership rate */,
  "median_home_value" INTEGER /* Median home value */,
  "rental_vacancy_rate" REAL /* Rental vacancy rate */,
  "median_rent" INTEGER /* Median rent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "commute_time" REAL /* Average commute time */,
  "public_transit_rate" REAL /* Public transportation rate */,
  "carpool_rate" REAL /* Carpool rate */,
  "bike_rate" REAL /* Bike rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "predicted_population" INTEGER /* Predicted population */,
  "predicted_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logging" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time at which the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logging_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_history" (
  "prediction_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction history entry */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "predicted_population" INTEGER /* Predicted population */,
  "predicted_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_history_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)
